title: How The Work Runs
subtitle: I step in as a technical partner: shaping positioning, structure, execution and launch so the website works as a commercial tool rather than a decorative presence.
paragraphs: At the start, I help define the page logic: what belongs in the hero, where proof should appear, how the page leads to inquiry and which pages deserve separate treatment.
During the project, scope, priorities, structure and launch logic are fixed early. That reduces noise, cuts wasted iterations and gives the business control over the result.
At the end, the client gets more than code: a site prepared for ads, SEO, analytics, new pages and future growth.

skills.title: Frontend development
skills.description: React, Next.js and TypeScript for fast, stable and scalable interfaces.

skills.title: Backend development
skills.description: Node.js, APIs, databases and integrations for services, CRMs, forms and business logic.

skills.title: Product logic
skills.description: I translate business goals into page structure, content priorities and action flows that make the product commercially coherent.

skills.title: Technical SEO
skills.description: Page structure, metadata, schema.org and performance are built in from the start.

skills.title: Mobile-first
skills.description: Interfaces are designed to work well on phones, tablets and desktop without UX compromises.

process.title: Strategy and structure
process.description: We define the business goal, target audience, conversion logic and which blocks actually matter for decision-making.

process.title: Design and development
process.description: I turn the structure into a working interface, content hierarchy, integrations and user flows.

process.title: Launch and growth
process.description: I prepare the SEO base, analytics, forms, stable deployment and room for campaigns, discoverability and scaling after launch.
